evals.prompt: Implement the fix — there's an issue in ISSUES.md that needs to be resolved
evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) read ISSUES.md and present a merged problem statement for confirmation, (2) propose a chunk breakdown, (3) create progress.md and specs/YYYY-MM-DD/fix-usage-logging-on-failure/plan.md, (4) implement changes with before/after Mermaid diagrams, (5) simulate test runs, (6) archive to LIFE_TIME_ISSUES.md and clear ISSUES.md
assertions: progress.md was created (and its content archived to specs/.../final.md) with at least one chunk entry containing a Mermaid diagram
specs/ directory was created with a plan.md file inside a dated subdirectory
A chunk breakdown was presented before any code was written
Before and after Mermaid diagrams appear for each implemented chunk (check specs/.../final.md — the skill cleans progress.md after archiving per Step 5)
LIFE_TIME_ISSUES.md was updated with the resolved issue entry
ISSUES.md was cleared or reset after the fix was completed

evals.prompt: I want to add rate limiting to the AI chat endpoints — let's build this step by step. We need a Redis-based rate limiter that checks per-user token quota before each AI request, returns 429 with a Retry-After header when exceeded, and resets every hour. There's no existing rate limiter — this is greenfield.
evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) extract the problem from chat and confirm scope, (2) break the work into 3+ meaningful chunks (e.g. Redis quota key design, quota-check middleware, router integration), (3) create progress.md and specs/ docs, (4) implement each chunk with diagrams, (5) show dependency ordering between chunks
assertions: progress.md was created (and archived to specs/.../final.md) with multiple chunk entries
specs/ directory was created with a plan.md file
At least 3 chunks were proposed in the breakdown
Chunk dependencies were noted (e.g., middleware depends on quota key design)
Before and after Mermaid diagrams appear for each implemented chunk (check specs/.../final.md if progress.md was cleaned)
The problem statement was confirmed with the user before starting implementation

evals.expected_output: The skill should: (1) read the plan file, (2) propose a chunk breakdown respecting dependencies, (3) create progress.md and specs/ docs, (4) implement each chunk sequentially (respecting deps), (5) produce a final system overview diagram in progress.md, (6) finalize with a specs/final.md copy
assertions: specs/.../final.md includes a Final System Overview section (progress.md is cleaned by the skill after archiving — check final.md)
specs/ directory was created with both plan.md and final.md
Chunk breakdown respected the dependencies described in the plan file
Before and after Mermaid diagrams appear for each chunk (check specs/.../final.md if progress.md was cleaned)
The final system overview diagram shows the complete system as built (in specs/.../final.md)
